title: Packing the Home Bar or Cafe Station: Safeguarding Premium Espresso Machines and Glassware Collections
excerpt: Pack home bar cafe station: safeguard premium espresso machines glassware collections, kitchen bar relocation packing guide Addis.
content:
Packing the home bar or cafe station: safeguarding premium espresso machines and glassware collections

Home bar and cafe station packs fragile density—espresso boiler internals, grinder burrs, crystal glassware one box bump from disaster. Safeguarding means drain water, lock portafilter, cell-divider every glass, and upright machine original box or custom foam.

This guide packs home bars and cafe stations protecting espresso machines and glassware.

Espresso machine protocol

  • Drain boiler and reservoir fully.
  • Secure portafilter tape; wrap steam wand.
  • OEM box foam or professional cradle.
  • Upright transport only.
  • Reconnect water filter new destination flush cycle.

Grinder and accessories

Burr lock if manual exists; beans bag separate; tamper bubble wrap; scale padded flat.

Glassware collections

Cell dividers each piece; double box tier; label FRAGILE GLASS top sides; no books stacked on; stemware vertical insert kit.

Spirits and pantry

Seal caps tape; upright; separate spices matrix cross-reference; comply transport law alcohol.

Active Movers bar pack tier

Glass dividers stock; machine upright truck zone; reconnect plumber referral optional.

Conclusion

Home bar survives move drained boxed and cell-divided—espresso and glassware morning one not shard cleanup.
author: Active Movers Team
